body: The safety filters are extremely restrictive. I am trying to create some Cyberpunk style anime characters for a SFW comic I'm writing for myself in order to exercise my English writing. HOW AN ANIME CHARACTER CAN BE A REAL PERSON?? All my characters are over 23.

The generated video should stay closer to the original uploaded photo.

author: Tiger Lin
body: Google Flow currently only supports a 1K photo generator, which feels far less practical than working on a desktop. When trying to generate front, back, side, or top-down views from an original image, the system often produces completely unrelated results. I attempted multiple times, but the outputs consistently failed. Since the 5/19/2026 update, the performance has become even worse to the point that the feature is essentially unusable.

author: Carlos Ezequiel machado
body: Pontos positivos: ​Imagens geradas (como a do gato realista e estilo dark) ficam excelentes. ​A animação de imagem única funciona muito bem. ​O modo "Take a photo" melhora bem os resultados. ​Pontos negativos: ​A geração de vídeos e movimentos é ruim e artificial. ​A voz da IA é extremamente robótica. ​O aplicativo apresenta muitos bugs frequentes durante o uso.

author: Ai Intelligence
body: Google Flow Beta is an amazing AI creative app with a clean and user-friendly interface. The AI generates impressive visuals and cinematic content quickly and accurately from simple prompts. It is fast, smooth, and very useful for creators, designers, and content makers. Although there are a few minor bugs because it is still in beta, the overall experience is excellent. Google has huge potential with this app, and future updates could make it one of the best AI creative tools available.

author: shoaib ansari
body: Promising tool, but needs refinement "Google Flow has a lot of potential for streamlining workflows, and I appreciate the clean interface. The integration capabilities are quite smooth, which makes it easy to set up basic tasks. However, I’ve noticed some latency issues during complex operations, and it can be a bit overwhelming for new users to navigate the advanced settings. It’s a good start, but I’m looking forward to more stability and perhaps some more intuitive tutorials in the upcoming!
